title: stupidbot: entry limit di bekas level SL (no market order)
description: Entry limit di bawah wick rejection (bekas SL), SL baru = limit - ATR; order hidup sampai zona/struktur rusak; TP limit maker; SL tetap stop-market. Backtest+portfolio+live konsisten.

title: stupidbot: live/paper runner (reuse executor & API pulseflow)
description: Runner polling candle closed; paper = simulasi penuh, live = entry+SL/TP exchange via subclass TradeExecutor pulseflow; state persistence; double opt-in untuk live

title: stupidbot: adaptive risk, equity protection, trade throttle, portfolio mode
description: Risk tier 0.5/1/1.5% naik saat equity high baru & turun saat DD; stop harian >2% / total >8%; batas 3-10 trade/bulan; portfolio pilih struktur Daily terbaik

title: stupidbot: engine live/paper trading
description: Baru ada backtester. Perlu runner live: polling candle closed Binance, eksekusi paper/live, persistence posisi, notifikasi.

title: stupidbot: riset selektivitas entry (expectancy default masih negatif)
description: Backtest BTCUSDT 1h 2024-2026: -0.20R/trade, PF 0.72; ETHUSDT -0.69R. Fold profit hanya saat trending (H2-2024, H1-2026). Kandidat: filter kualitas struktur Daily lebih ketat, evaluasi partial_tp_r (loser sering MFE >1R), target TP. Validasi wajib walk-forward, jangan overfit.

title: stupidbot: implementasi bot price action (Daily bias, entry 1H/15M, ATR-only)
description: Bangun sistem trading modular sesuai spec: market structure, daily bias, entry engine, risk manager, position manager, backtester, logger

title: Node-Graph GUI (Blueprint-style) untuk PulseFlow
description: Tambah tab NODE GRAPH ala Unreal Blueprint di dashboard PyQt6: monitor pipeline live (Feed->Velocity/ATR->Battle/Liquidity/HTF/Wash->Entry->Executor) + editor parametrik (enable/disable & bobot 6 confluence check, node kontrol direction/armed/risk/htf/listing). Custom node editor di atas QGraphicsView/QGraphicsScene, tanpa dependensi baru. Persist ke graph_config.json.
notes: Implementasi selesai & terverifikasi headless (mode simulated, 43 tick): FEED/ENTRY tampil data live, kabel berdenyut. File baru: pulseflow/ui/nodegraph/{__init__,port,edge,node_item,scene,nodes,config,panel}.py. Modif: entry/engine.py (set_check_config/get_check_config + override _check_disabled/_weight_override, additif), dashboard.py (tab NODE GRAPH, wiring sinyal ke slot lama, 4 slot baru _on_node_*). Persist ke graph_config.json. Sisa: verifikasi user di GUI nyata (python run.py), lalu commit/push.
